practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the greedy clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for cookie matching, stock gains, and farthest reach.
hints: Cookies use the smallest helpful cookie.
Stock II takes every positive rise.
Jump Game tracks the farthest reachable index.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main greedy clues.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck cookie matching, positive rises, and farthest reach.
